description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display on the front, featuring a vivid wallpaper of a person with a bird and several app icons. The device has a sleek, rectangular form with rounded corners and a slim profile, as seen from the side views. The back of the phone is solid black and houses a dual-lens camera module in the top left corner, slightly raised from the surface. The phone's frame appears to be made of metal or high-quality plastic, while the front is dominated by a glossy glass screen. No visible branding or logo is present on the exterior surfaces. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, black back, and dual rear cameras in the top left corner. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen with vivid wallpaper and app icons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and slight camera bump on the back.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a solid black surface with a dual-lens camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the thinness of the device and the protruding camera module.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a wallpaper of a person with a bird, set against an orange sky with silhouettes of birds. Several app icons are visible, including a phone, messages, camera, and a purple icon labeled 'Phone Man.' The time is shown as 21:37, and there are standard status icons for battery, signal, and notifications at the top.
attribute_camera_placement: Dual camera module located in the top left corner on the back, arranged horizontally with a slight raised bump.
attribute_button_layout: Two slim buttons are visible on the right edge, likely for volume and power functions.
